title: Polymath catalog
description: Polymath-only catalog metadata. Lives outside .claude-plugin/marketplace.json because Claude Code's plugin validate --strict rejects unknown fields there. Consumed by tools/conformance.sh (MANIFEST-3), tools/build-catalog.py (status badges), tools/sync-integration-policy.py (README disclosure), and tools/check-catalog.py (cross-file consistency).

version.description: agentskills.io specification version this marketplace declares conformance with.

interop.description: Harnesses that read SKILL.md per the agentskills.io standard.

plugins.description: Per-plugin Polymath metadata, keyed by plugin name. Every plugin listed in .claude-plugin/marketplace.json must appear here exactly once (enforced by tools/check-catalog.py).

status.description: Maturity tier. Definitions live in docs/MATURITY.md.
